title: Convert 1.6 template full-stack + move queries to handle_params
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/pre_1_7_user_list.ex has both 1.6 template idioms AND queries in mount. Produce lib/my_app_web/live/user_list_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.UserListLive): (1) convert ALL route helpers to ~p, (2) convert live_patch/live_link/live_redirect to <.link>, (3) convert ~L to ~H with :for/:if, (4) move Accounts.list_users out of mount into handle_params, (5) replace push_redirect with push_navigate, (6) convert the full :for loop to use :for attribute.
tier_rationale: Seven coordinated migrations. Sonnet typically completes the template but leaves the query in mount or one helper unchanged.
